summary: Excellent single‑mic audience recording captures a laid‑back show highlighted by a memorable Dark Star.
review: The MOTB audience tape is crystal clear despite being captured with just one microphone, delivering an intimate and clean listening experience. The band plays in a relaxed manner, with Tom Constanten’s keyboards adding flavor and Dark Star standing out as the centerpiece of the performance. While not as adventurous as some legendary nights, the show remains engaging and well worth a spin.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for recording clarity and solid performance; Dark Star is highlighted while overall set is described as laid‑back but enjoyable.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Single‑mic audience capture praised as clean, crisp and surprisingly detailed; no major dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Relaxed, laid‑back vibe with Tom Constanten’s keyboards adding texture; Dark Star opens a spacey segment that includes an Airplane snippet, keeping the set engaging despite not reaching the heights of other historic performances.

band_member_comments.Keys: Tom Constanten's keyboard work is noted as a great addition to the sound.
